account.completeHint: A complete profile gets more replies from companies.

auth.signinSub: Sign in to track your applications and alerts.
auth.signupTitle: Create your account and find work
auth.signupSub: One profile, all your applications and alerts in one place.
auth.name: Name
auth.perk: You'll build your AI profile in 2 minutes, apply in one tap and get alerts for jobs that fit.
auth.terms: By continuing you accept TalentOS's Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.panelTitle: One profile. Every company in Venezuela.
auth.perkProfileDesc: Upload your CV and your profile builds itself in 2 minutes.
auth.perkOneTapDesc: No more filling forms on every job.
auth.perkAlertsDesc: We ping you when the right role opens.
auth.companySessionNote: You have a company session open. Signing in as a candidate will replace it.

assistant.title: Job assistant
assistant.greeting: Hi! I'm your search assistant. Tell me what job you're after in your own words — field, city, salary, work mode — and I'll bring you the best matches. I only search: I never post or share anything.
assistant.placeholderDesktop: e.g. remote design above $1,500 in Caracas
assistant.empty: I couldn't find jobs for that right now. Try broadening your search.
assistant.error: I couldn't process your search. Please try again.
suggestionsDesktop: Create an alert for this search
assistant.cap1Desc: Area, city, salary and modality in plain language.
assistant.cap2Desc: Apply without leaving the chat, with your profile.
assistant.cap3Desc: Save the search and I'll notify you of new jobs.
assistant.railIntro: Tell me what you want in your own words and I'll bring you the best jobs on the board. I only search for you: I never post or share anything.
assistant.interpretedLead: Here's what I understood from your search.
assistant.foundN: {count, plural, =1 {Found 1 matching job.} other {Found # matching jobs.}}
assistant.widenedLead: No exact matches, but here is the closest.
assistant.none: No jobs matched those criteria. Try broadening: remove the location or change the work mode.
assistant.alertCreatedText: Done — I saved your search as an alert. I will notify you as soon as matching jobs come in.
assistant.alertFailed: I could not create the alert right now. Please try again.

builder.title: Build your profile with AI
builder.intro: Tell me what you do and in 2 minutes I'll build your profile. You can adjust everything after.
builder.introUpdate: Update your profile and CV to receive better job offers.
builder.modality: How do you want to work?
builder.pitch: In one line, what makes you great?
builder.pitchPlaceholder: e.g. I design complex flows with research and scalable systems.
builder.cvQuestion: Got a CV? Upload it and I'll use it as base — you can still edit everything.
builder.cvQuestionUpdate: Want to update your CV? Upload it here to refresh your profile.
builder.disclaimer: AI proposes · you confirm and publish
builder.doneDesc: Written by AI from what you told us. Edit whatever you like.
builder.headline: Suggested headline
builder.error: I couldn't generate the profile. Please try again.
builder.previewAboutNotice: AI will write your summary from what you complete, when you press Generate.
builder.cvUploadBig: Upload your CV and I build your profile
builder.cvUploadHint: PDF or text · I parse it, you confirm
builder.parsingReassure: Extracting experience and skills · nothing published
builder.completeMissing: Add experience, education, languages and your portfolio (or upload your CV) to reach 100%.
builder.intakeEyebrow: Tell us what you're looking for
builder.intakeLead: The fast way: upload your CV and we complete it for you. Or answer these fields and AI writes your profile.
builder.cvRowHint: PDF · we extract experience, education and skills
builder.roleNoResults: No matches. Use the closest one.
builder.addSkillPlaceholder: Add another skill and press Enter
builder.previewDone: Written by AI — review and confirm
